rationale: The selected commit 7988f7b0 (Qwen 3.6 Plus) is already the 'current' version in the provided MDX for Spanish. It correctly translates the title and body while maintaining Dan's direct style. The suggestions from the previous judge report have already been applied to the 'current' text (the code block descriptions are already translated in the provided Spanish source), so no further high-priority suggestions are needed.

suggestionLog.match: description: 'Evaluate mathematical expressions and solve equations with guaranteed accuracy. MUST be used for all mathematical operations to verify correctness - do not attempt mental math. Supports arithmetic, algebra, calculus, and complex operations. Can process multiple expressions at once.',
suggestionLog.replacement: description: 'Evalúa expresiones matemáticas y resuelve ecuaciones con precisión garantizada. DEBE usarse para todas las operaciones matemáticas para verificar la corrección; no intentes hacer cálculos mentales. Soporta aritmética, álgebra, cálculo y operaciones complejas. Puede procesar múltiples expresiones a la vez.',
suggestionLog.reason: The tool description inside the code block should be translated as it is part of the 'prompt engineering' discussed in the article, and the English version is provided in the text.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.

suggestionLog.match: 'Array of mathematical expressions in LaTeX or plain notation, e.g. ["2 + 2", "\\frac{x^2 + 1}{x - 1}", "\\int x^2 dx"]'
suggestionLog.replacement: 'Array de expresiones matemáticas en LaTeX o notación simple, ej. ["2 + 2", "\\frac{x^2 + 1}{x - 1}", "\\int x^2 dx"]'
suggestionLog.reason: The parameter description should be translated for consistency.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
